channel.title: Business - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: January's EV Registrations Fell 41% As The Full Weight Of Trump's Policy Changes Hit Home - Jalopnik
item.description:
1. January's EV Registrations Fell 41% As The Full Weight Of Trump's Policy Changes Hit Home  Jalopnik

  4. Electric vehicle sales are plummeting. Will they soon become too niche?  abcnews.com
  5. America’s EV Walkback Will Be Paid For A Decade From Now  Autoblog

  5. Oracle stock jumps 10% on earnings beat and increased guidance as cloud revenue climbs 44%  CNBC

item.title: Teamsters Call on DOJ to Stop Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger: “We’ve Seen What Happens When Corporations Consolidate Power” - The Hollywood Reporter
item.description:
1. Teamsters Call on DOJ to Stop Paramount-Warner Bros. Merger: “We’ve Seen What Happens When Corporations Consolidate Power”  The Hollywood Reporter
  2. Paramount-Warner Bros mega-merger could still face ‘real threats’, antitrust experts say  The Guardian
  3. Teamsters: Without Worker Protections, DOJ Must Block Paramount-Warner Merger  International Brotherhood of Teamsters
  4. Paramount may have landed Warner Bros., now comes the baggage  Los Angeles Times
  5. Warner Bros looks set for Oscars success - but takeover plans have created uncertainty in Hollywood  Sky News

item.title: China’s OpenClaw Boom Is a Gold Rush for AI Companies - WIRED

item.title: California passed a law to curb spikes in gas prices. Why isn’t it using those powers now? - CalMatters
item.description:
1. California passed a law to curb spikes in gas prices. Why isn’t it using those powers now?  CalMatters
  2. Tips to save at the gas pump in California. There’s more to it than ‘drive less’  Sacramento Bee
  3. Governor Lombardo sends letter to Governor Newsom about California fuel regulations  KTVN
  4. Gas prices are soaring. How much will a renewed California climate policy add to costs?  San Francisco Chronicle
  5. California Gas Prices Are on the Rise. Who's to Blame?  KQED
